title: matelea holtonii
intro: Matelea holtonii, also known as the 'Coral Milkflower', is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Matelea holtonii include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing and reducing fever. Matelea holtonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
